dxc.name: dxc
dxc.notes: Installs Microsoft DirectX Shader Compiler for HLSL/DXIL shader builds.

cmake.name: cmake
cmake.notes: Portable CMake build system generator for Windows x64.

ninja.name: ninja
ninja.notes: Fast parallel build system, commonly used with CMake.

glslang.name: glslang
glslang.notes: Install the Vulkan SDK or place glslangValidator in PATH. Portable Vulkan SDK support is not automated yet.

renderdoc.name: renderdoc
renderdoc.notes: Install RenderDoc from https://renderdoc.org/ for GPU frame debugging.

sdl_shadercross.name: sdl_shadercross
sdl_shadercross.notes: SDL_shadercross has a CLI and runtime library, but CDo does not yet automate building its portable binary.
